title: LOW-COST HOUSING PROPERTIES - 211info
text: NORTHWEST HOUSING ALTERNATIVES LOW-COST HOUSING PROPERTIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides listings of affordable housing. Please note that this agency does not administrate those properties and that is done by outside management companies. Contact information is listed on the individual pages. Eligibility: Low-income families, older adults, and people with special needs Hours: Not applicable (503) 655-8575 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-8575 Main INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Bend, Florence, Gladstone, Hermiston, Hillsboro, Hines, Lake Oswego, Medford, Milwaukie, Molalla, Monmouth, Portland, Salem, and Wilsonville Services: Low Cost Home Rental Listings If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
